programmes.show_description: Crime thriller starring Luke Goss. In his final mission, an elite hitman returns to erase his past, only to find that somebody has messed with his future.
Based on a true story, Corbin Bernsen stars as a dentist who (according to his wife) may also be a serial killer. Look out too for Dr Frasier Crane, Kelsey Grammer, in a supporting role.
Horror Channel returns soon.

While waiting to get a haircut, a man claims his good friend cut him with a new knife because he didn't like his jokes.
A caterer says a bride tried to blackmail her by demanding money in exchange for not writing a terrible online review of her business.
A woman is accused of breaking into her mother's house; she claims she lived there but wasn't allowed to have a key.
A troubled teen is accused of stealing money from her grandmother after leaving her custody.
A woman resorts to self-help in her efforts to financially recover from an alleged attack on her small dog.
A clubbing incident in Mexico allegedly leads to an ambush by teenagers in California when a car is vandalized with a crowbar.
When a check bounces, the payee is accused of using the check's routing information to retrieve money illegally.
A woman, not quite ready for a break up, allegedly keys her ex-lover's car and sprays his home with ketchup; anger management classes are required.
Sisters pull together to pay for their father's funeral only to be pulled apart by life insurance delays; the Judge takes the insurance company to task.
Find out what's happening in London today with all the latest local news, opinions and events.
Charlotte Pinkney vanished from Ilfracombe after going to a party. Police launched a murder hunt when her handbag was found in undergrowth - would they find the perpetrator?
A Bournemouth hotelier called Peter Taylor gets away with murdering his wife in 1982; but when he conspires to kill his son-in-law nine years later, his luck runs out.
In 2004, Zainab Begum from Lancashire, UK, vanished, and her daughter Samina grew suspicious when her brothers-in-law showed little concern. Her body was never recovered.
In 2017, 15-year-old Kyron Webb was fatally stabbed on Moston Lane, Manchester, UK, by two masked youths. CCTV showed Kyron approaching the pair before being stabbed twice.
Find out what's happening in London today with all the latest local news, opinions and events.
A convalescent is trapped in a living nightmare during a plane journey when he sees a gremlin on the wing. Guest starring William Shatner.
The twisted tale of a unique watch with the ability to freeze time and stop all movement in the world. Guest starring Jenny Agutter.
Fact-based drama, with Jessica Chastain. A CIA operative spends 10 years searching for information on the whereabouts of Osama bin Laden, ultimately leading to the final raid on his hideout.
Remake of the 1950 neo noir thriller, with Dennis Quaid. A professor accused of murdering his wife's lover is given a slow-acting poison and has 24 hours to find his would-be killer.
Steven Soderbergh's romantic crime drama with George Clooney. A US Marshal pursues a charming thief preparing for a final job, but as the chase intensifies, so do their feelings for each other.

A woman accuses her fiancé's father of suing her out of spite because he doesn't get to see his granddaughter as much as he'd like to.
A restraining order, slashed tires and alleged theft come into play when ex friends call it quits.
When a woman's vehicle is repossessed, she tells the car salesman's wife that he made inappropriate passes at her.
The Judge dispenses wise advice to a teen who is allegedly hanging out with pot-smoking, drinking friends; he is sued for damages from an icy-road crash.
Two women are caught on video chasing a man down in his place of business after he repossessed the car they bought.
A young mother confides in her landlord when things get rough with her live-in lover; he denies any illegal activity.
A man and woman claim their landlord blames them for the loss of his daughter to social services; they say he then called DCS on them.
After a young woman witnesses the murder of her pet chickens by a neighbour's Husky, she draws a gun and kills the animal; neighbours deny it's their dog.
A 13-year-old boy is accused of attacking a 10-year-old and breaking his arm after throwing him to the ground; children take the stand to defend themselves.

Behind The Mask: This is a gripping series exploring notorious murder cases that transformed idyllic UK rural landscapes into crime scenes.
In April 2022, Katie Kenyon vanished from her home. A chilling investigation revealed her manipulative ex-boyfriend had trapped her in a cycle of fear.
In 2019 in Hays, Kansas, Colby Trickle called 911 and said he woke up to his ears ringing and saw his wife, Kristen Trickle, bleeding next to him in the bed.
The body of Jessica Knott is meticulously analysed and evidence reveals a startling truth about the killer.
Tooth or Consequences: Analysing the evidence, the medical detectives solve real crimes using forensic techniques, alongside reconstructions (which may be unsuitable for younger viewers).

Chuck Norris is Walker in this modern, high-kicking martial arts western. Roscoe Jones, the minister who replaced Trent's father, is targeted by a former military comrade.
Sci-fi sequel with Vin Diesel. A fugitive abandoned on a deadly alien planet lures bounty hunters there in a plot to escape, but is forced to work with them against an attack by the monsters.
80s' sci-fi. When Nada finds a pair of sunglasses that reveal the truth about the world when he wears them, he discovers the streets of LA are full of aliens hell bent on world domination.
